description.value:
Skill Path: False Impressions

You became a deceptively well lier, easily concealing the truth from anyone who shouldn't know it.

While developing your skills in Deception you chose to focus specifically on False Impressions, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HEBXaS656MZTiWFu]{Lengthy Diversion}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lQs2i9L09MQiZSPC]{Charlatan}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HEBXaS656MZTiWFu]{Lengthy Diversion}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lQs2i9L09MQiZSPC]{Charlatan}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6Z4e3B9vePYpibcy]{Confabulator}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Z7M3ImHWqUyGu6cN]{Fleeing Diversion}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.FeH272Nvfx7ZDzZd]{False Expressions}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XZcd1wFHy111klu2]{Reveal Machinations}
